chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.216 of 2017 Raheel Saleem Versus Muhammad Tahir Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 19.01.2024 None present. -.-.- Since 21.09.2021 the matter is being fixed for non-prosecution as consistently observed since last four dates. Today is the fifth date when neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. Even the office objections have not been complied with since beginning i.e. since 2017. It appears that appellant has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
